name: Social Video Downloader API
description: Extract video download URLs from TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook by parsing public HTML pages. Fast and reliable.
long_description:
## Overview

Extract video download URLs and metadata from TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, YouTube, and Facebook. Lightweight API built on Cloudflare Workers using pure HTML parsing — no browser automation or headless browsers required for maximum speed.

## Key Features

- ✅ Support for 5 major platforms: TikTok, Twitter/X, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook
- ✅ Direct video download URL extraction
- ✅ Metadata-only mode for video info without download
- ✅ Platform auto-detection from URL pattern
- ✅ Ultra-fast HTML parsing (no headless browser overhead)

## Use Cases

- **Content Archiving**: Save social media videos for backup and compliance
- **Video Aggregators**: Build multi-platform video feeds and playlists
- **Social Media Tools**: Provide download functionality in social management apps
- **Research**: Collect video metadata for social media analytics
- **Mobile Apps**: Enable video saving and offline viewing features

## Quick Start

```
GET /download?url=https://www.tiktok.com/@user/video/123456789
```

Returns JSON with `download_url`, `title`, `author`, `thumbnail`, and platform info.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit |
|------|-------|-------------|------------|
| **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 500 | 1/sec |
| Pro | $5.99 | 50,000 | 10/sec |
| Ultra | $14.99 | 500,000 | 50/sec |
| Mega | $49.99 | 2,000,000 | 100/sec |

Free tier supports all 5 platforms. No credit card required.
